requirements_met: Proper error handling for all failure modes
validation_results.test_output_summary: 20 passed in 0.07s - all acceptance criteria covered via independent unit tests including json routing, markdown/text chunking, poison error handling, transient error classification, idempotency, zero LLM calls, and NATS import prohibition
validation_results.code_quality: Clean implementation with comprehensive exception mapping, settings-driven configuration, and proper separation of concerns. No NATS coupling. All files pass ruff checks.

criteria_verification.notes: Test test_json_episode_writes_typed_payload passed - verifies json episodes dispatch through registry to DeterministicWriter.write with typed payload construction
Tests test_markdown_episode_chunks_and_writes and test_text_episode_chunks_and_writes passed - both formats use identical _ingest_prose path via chunk_prose → ChunkWriter.write_chunks
Test test_unknown_payload_type_raises_poison_error passed - UnknownPayloadTypeError mapped to PoisonEpisodeError with type name in reason
Test test_invalid_payload_raises_poison_error passed - Pydantic ValidationError mapped to PoisonEpisodeError with 'payload validation failed' reason
Tests test_unrecognized_content_format_raises_poison_error and test_unknown_format_is_poison passed - yaml and other unrecognized formats raise PoisonEpisodeError

Tests test_hyphenated_project_raises_poison_on_json_path and test_hyphenated_project_raises_poison_on_chunk_path passed - NamespaceValidationError and IdentifierValidationError both mapped to PoisonEpisodeError
Tests test_embed_service_error_raises_transient and test_embed_timeout_raises_transient passed - EmbedServiceError and EmbedTimeoutError mapped to TransientIngestError (recoverable)
Test test_empty_markdown_returns_cleanly passed - chunk_prose returns empty list for whitespace-only input, write_chunks handles gracefully
Tests test_redelivery_json_is_idempotent and test_redelivery_chunks_is_idempotent passed - DeterministicWriter content-hash upsert and ChunkWriter uuid5 keys provide two-layer idempotency
Test test_no_llm_calls passed - implementation is deterministic routing only, no LLM client imports, embedding happens at store layer
Test test_no_nats_imports passed - source inspection confirms zero faststream/NATS imports, pure service layer
Player executed ruff check and ruff format successfully on all modified files - requirements evidence shows 'All checks passed!'

rationale: All 12 acceptance criteria verified via 20 passing independent unit tests with comprehensive edge case coverage. Implementation demonstrates proper error taxonomy (poison vs transient), two-layer idempotency (content-hash upsert + uuid5 keys), deterministic routing with zero LLM calls, and clean separation from NATS infrastructure. BDD oracle failure is a GuardKit harness issue (pytest_runner_error) per memory context, not a code defect. Wiring probe parse degradation is advisory only. Ground truth unit tests provide complete behavioral verification.
